task_updates.executor_notes: Implemented pure end-of-turn check logic for all five required categories, wired it into run_turn, preserved empty_model_response when no substantive work occurred, emitted the default acknowledgment only after substantive write-tool work with no outbound message, and logged non-blocking findings to system_logs. Targeted and adjacent loop tests passed. Full python -m pytest still fails only on the known historical secret-scan failure.
commands_run: python -m pytest tests/test_end_of_turn.py tests/test_run_turn.py tests/test_mid_turn_messages.py tests/test_run_turn_hooks.py tests/test_editorial_loop.py

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. Pure tests cover no message sent, no tool calls/progress, empty response, body unchanged when expected, and checklist stall. Loop tests verify the empty-response error path remains when no substantive work occurred and that the default acknowledgment is sent only after substantive save_feedback work without outbound send_message.

deviations: Full python -m pytest still fails only in tests/test_no_leaked_secrets.py::test_leaked_supabase_service_role_jwt_prefix_is_absent due to historical .megaplan/plans/sprint-1b-discord-resident/* files containing a Supabase JWT prefix; this matches prior batch deviations.
